content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(3, 5, 0), (2, 8, 1), (3, 7, 8), (6, 7, 8), (0, 5, 9), (3, 9, 11), (4, 5, 11), (2, 3, 12), (2, 9, 12), (1, 3, 15), (2, 6, 23), (4, 6, 24), (3, 6, 25)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 6 exactly at time 25.

First, we will scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

For time 25:

* Edge (3, 5, 0) has node 3 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (2, 8, 1) has node 2 and time 1. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (3, 7, 8) has node 3 and time 8. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (6, 7, 8) has node 6 and time 8. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (0, 5, 9) has node 0 and time 9. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (3, 9, 11) has node 3 and time 11. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (4, 5, 11) has node 4 and time 11. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (2, 3, 12) has node 2 and time 12. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (2, 9, 12) has node 2 and time 12. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 3, 15) has node 1 and time 15. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (2, 6, 23) has node 2 and time 23. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (4, 6, 24) has node 4 and time 24. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (3, 6, 25) has node 3 and time 25. -> Add node 6.

The nodes matched at time 25 are 7, 8, and 6.

Answer: [7, 8, 6]
